name: why-not-now
description: Capture deferred work in Codex and manage it from a local dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Discuss deferred work and track it in a local dashboard.
interface.longDescription: A three-state deferred-work dashboard with separate Codex sessions for reflection and execution. Capture tasks, discuss why not now, and start work with useful saved context without storing session links.
defaultPrompt: Use $wnn to capture a task and discuss why it should wait.
Open the WhyNotNow dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:49321/.
Use the dashboard to discuss or execute a saved WhyNotNow task in a fresh Codex session.
